title: The Psychology of Delayed Gratification

segments.text: Instant gratification can undermine your wealth.
And wait until you hear the next point.
Self-made individuals practice delayed gratification for long-term gain.
They choose to forego short-term pleasure for future benefits.
That's how they cultivate lasting prosperity over time.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Delayed gratification is a key to lasting wealth. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 💰
